title: Untrusted Markup, Formula Injection, Paths, Logs, and Plugin Boundaries · Diagnostic Repair Bay
summary: A preserved TypeScript crawl trace contains one plausible scope, URL, robots, Fetch, stream, Cheerio, selector, frontier, Promise, browser, axe, report, security, or shutdown defect; identify the first invalid transition before editing. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in safe untrusted-content processing boundary and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and ev…
objectives: Render findings through text-safe sinks or context-specific encoding and narrowly reviewed sanitization.
Preserve data while neutralizing spreadsheet formula triggers under an explicit export and consumer contract.
Generate owned filenames, confine paths, reject traversal and unsafe archive entries, and handle collisions and Unicode deliberately.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Authorized site auditing and TypeScript Inspect the failure record · Debug Safe Rendering Sinks
steps.instruction:
debug case — A debug TypeScript team handles case 7291 during a hostile redirect, stream, and checkpoint drill. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to defend HTML, CSV, paths, archives, logs, terminals, and plugins against untrusted crawler content; every Promise, stream, listener, timer, socket, file, browser context, and report sink needs one cleanup owner; then inject one authenticated, private-data, output-injection, path, log, plugin, or correction fault and contain it. Browser TypeScript uses pure bounded models and original URL, robots, sitemap, HTTP, HTML, frontier, accessibility, browser, and report fixtures only. Real DNS, Fetch, streams, Cheerio, Playwright, axe-core, files, processes, packages, containers, assistive-technology review, load, legal review, restore, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Render findings through text-safe sinks or context-specific encoding and narrowly reviewed sanitization.
